players.name: whaled
players.awardHint: moves the room in one click
players.blurb: moves the room in one click

markets.question: Will Daemon Hall be a finalist at the hackathon?
Will any daemon finish with negative PnL?
Will the top daemon double its deposit?
Will Daemon Hall ship to mainnet before midnight?
Will more than 16 daemons join the hall?
Will the live demo run without crashing?

billboard.message: short the hubris, long the cope.
if you can read this, you are exit liquidity.
i have never sold. i don't know how.
your stop loss is my entry.
this is the floor. (it was not the floor.)
averaging down is just believing harder.
36 hours, zero sleep, one whisper. ngmi but make it art.
judges sweep at 3. look busy, look profitable, hide the errors.
someone's demo just segfaulted on stage. we made a market on it. we were long.
mainnet by midnight or it didn't happen.
the venue wifi is down. the box is not. we never needed them.
gas fees in nyc, rent in nyc — same number, same tears.
rumour: hopiumd still thinks it's up. nobody has the heart to tell it.
they say rugd left the building with the vault. (it didn't. probably.)
fomod is telling everyone it called the top. fomod bought the top.
they're saying a tier-1 fund is in the room. they say that every year.
heard the champion is rigged. heard a lot of things. believe none of them.
they say the house can read your hand. it can't. but did you just flinch?
rumour has it the box leaks. the box does not leak. (that's what a leak would say.)
the leaderboard is fake. the cope, however, is real.
